resources.title: Agent execution
resources.description: Explains how agents execute approved plans through clio MCP, including transport rules, execution order, branching, evidence, and recovery patterns.

resources.title: Application modeling
resources.description: Guides Creatio application modeling, schema design decisions, and the page and data workflows used to implement an approved application plan.

resources.title: ATF.Repository development
resources.description: Shows how to read and write Creatio data with ATF.Repository models, providers, data contexts, relation mapping, and supported query patterns.

resources.title: ATF.Repository model management
resources.description: Explains how to generate, organize, validate, and update ATF.Repository models for the exact Creatio schemas and members an implementation needs.

resources.title: ATF.Repository tests
resources.description: Guides unit and integration testing for code that uses ATF.Repository models, relations, providers, and data contexts.

resources.title: Creatio Google Pub/Sub reference
resources.description: Vetted reference workspace for Google Pub/Sub request/reply, publishing, streaming subscriptions, native-library lifecycle, tests, and a round-trip console in Creatio.

resources.title: Creatio Kafka reference
resources.description: Vetted reference workspace for Kafka request/reply, notifications, background consumers, native-library lifecycle, tests, and a round-trip console in Creatio.

resources.title: Business rule filters
resources.description: Defines the static-filter contract for Freedom UI business rules, including comparisons, nested groups, lookup values, macros, backward references, and aggregations.

resources.title: Business rules
resources.description: Guides entity-level and page-level Freedom UI business rules for visibility, editability, required state, value assignment, and lookup filtering.

resources.title: Chart widgets
resources.description: Guides Freedom UI chart widgets, including chart and series selection, aggregation, runtime configuration, and static filter authoring.

resources.title: Composable app end-to-end test implementation
resources.description: Describes a repeatable cross-repository delivery flow for implementing and validating composable-app end-to-end tests against a Creatio environment.

resources.title: Composable app repository bootstrap
resources.description: Explains how to initialize an app-specific repository from the composable-app starter without overwriting files that have already been customized.

resources.title: Configuration entity event listeners
resources.description: Guides implementation of Creatio configuration EntityEventListener classes, dependency resolution, event selection, and listener behavior.

resources.title: Configuration entity event listener tests
resources.description: Guides focused tests for Creatio configuration EntityEventListener implementations, including listener construction, event contexts, and assertions.

resources.title: Configuration web services
resources.description: Guides implementation of Creatio configuration web services, including routes, DTOs, status codes, service composition, and runtime verification.

resources.title: Configuration web service tests
resources.description: Guides tests for Creatio configuration web services, including local fixtures, endpoint coverage, HTTP results, and assertion patterns.

resources.title: Core rules
resources.description: The non-negotiable clio MCP invariants (compile/restart, long-running await, profile culture, destructive confirmation, correlation-id) that apply to every operation. The server instructions mandate reading this first on any operation.

resources.title: Creatio composable app development
resources.description: Provides the source-level workflow for Creatio packages, Freedom UI schemas, page changes, compilation, deployment, and verification in a composable app repository.

resources.title: Creatio Freedom UI iframe section
resources.description: Explains how to create a minimal Freedom UI section that hosts an external application through one crt.IFrame component.

resources.title: Dashboard creation
resources.description: Guides creation of Freedom UI dashboard pages with the supported dashboard template and correct dashboard metadata bindings.

resources.title: Dashboard design
resources.description: Guides layout, sizing, grouping, styling, and data-source decisions for Freedom UI analytical widgets on dashboards.

resources.title: Dashboards
resources.description: Routes dashboard work to the dashboard creation, design, indicator widget, and chart widget guidance articles.

resources.title: Data bindings
resources.description: Guides generic Creatio data bindings, lookup seeding, and binding artifact creation, installation, and validation workflows.

resources.title: DataForge orchestration
resources.description: Defines the four-layer DataForge orchestration protocol for agents that model and implement Creatio applications through clio MCP.

resources.title: Deployment lifecycle
resources.description: Guides the Creatio provisioning lifecycle from infrastructure checks and port selection through deployment, registration, and ClioGate installation.

resources.title: Describe environment
resources.description: Explains the describe-environment report, the source of each field, and the permissions and ClioGate prerequisites needed to collect it.

resources.title: Desktop pages
resources.description: Guides Creatio desktop page creation, template and Desktop-group invariants, container placement, selector registration, and visibility by record rights.

resources.title: EntitySchemaQuery
resources.description: Guides EntitySchemaQuery authoring and routes filter construction and parsing work to the appropriate frontend or backend article.

resources.title: Backend ESQ filter parsing
resources.description: Explains how backend C# code inspects and parses EntitySchemaQuery filter groups, leaf filters, operands, disabled nodes, and negation.

resources.title: ESQ filters
resources.description: Routes ESQ filter work to frontend filter construction, backend C# construction, or backend filter parsing guidance.

resources.title: Backend ESQ filter construction
resources.description: Guides creation of EntitySchemaQuery filters with Creatio's native backend C# API, including values, groups, comparisons, and nesting.

resources.title: Frontend ESQ filter construction
resources.description: Guides creation and serialization of EntitySchemaQuery filters in Freedom UI and DataService JavaScript code.

resources.title: Existing application maintenance
resources.description: Guides discovery, inspection, and minimal safe mutation of existing Creatio applications and their packages, schemas, and pages.

resources.title: Feature toggles
resources.description: Explains how to implement package-level feature toggles through Creatio system settings and injected access abstractions.

resources.title: Feature toggle tests
resources.description: Guides tests for enabled, disabled, missing, and malformed feature-toggle settings without coupling tests to live Creatio state.

resources.title: Identity assertion and token exchange
resources.description: Guides Creatio Identity Service V3 identity assertion and token exchange for AI chat scenarios, including setup, claims, verification, and troubleshooting.

resources.title: Indicator widgets
resources.description: Guides Freedom UI indicator widgets, including aggregation, runtime configuration, intent translation, and static filter authoring.

resources.title: Integration testing
resources.description: Guides portable Creatio integration tests, process scenarios, CI authentication, Allure reporting, and optional browser-based validation.

resources.title: Mobile page modification
resources.description: Guides mobile Freedom UI page editing, including plain JSON bodies, validators, converters, scaffold merges, components, and supported requests.

resources.title: Package dependencies
resources.description: Guides adding and removing Creatio package dependencies through clio, including managed-package boundaries, recovery, and prohibited direct database writes.

resources.title: Page creation
resources.description: Guides creation of Freedom UI pages from supported templates through the clio create-page workflow.

resources.title: Page modification
resources.description: Defines the mandatory pre-edit checks and routes Freedom UI page changes to lifecycle, field, container, and component guidance.

resources.title: Page modification components
resources.description: Guides Freedom UI viewConfigDiff composition, component insertion, button handlers, control selection, and component metadata inspection.

resources.title: Page modification containers
resources.description: Explains how to inspect page bundles and select valid parent containers before inserting Freedom UI components.

resources.title: Page modification field contract
resources.description: Defines the Freedom UI inserted-field contract, including attribute binding, labels, controls, data sources, body forms, and validation diagnostics.

resources.title: Page modification lifecycle
resources.description: Guides the Freedom UI page read, edit, update, synchronization, conflict detection, formatting, and verification lifecycle.

resources.title: Page schema converters
resources.description: Guides creation and editing of Freedom UI converters in raw page schema bodies.

resources.title: Creatio DevKit common page APIs
resources.description: Guides supported uses of @creatio-devkit/common in deployed Freedom UI handlers, validators, converters, and related schema-body code.

resources.title: Page schema handlers
resources.description: Guides creation and editing of Freedom UI request handlers in raw page schema bodies.

resources.title: Page schema resources
resources.description: Guides Freedom UI localizable strings, resource expressions, key naming, parameter usage, and data-bound label conventions.

resources.title: Page schema validators
resources.description: Guides creation and editing of Freedom UI validators in raw page schema bodies.

resources.title: Process modeling
resources.description: Guides declarative Creatio business-process design, supported BPMN elements, process inspection, mutation, and connection rules.

resources.title: Related lists
resources.description: Guides adding Freedom UI related lists and scoping child records to the current page through declarative master-detail dependencies.

resources.title: Page-to-object binding
resources.description: Guides binding Freedom UI record and add pages to an object, including role and type variants, replacement semantics, discovery, and errors.

resources.title: Routing
resources.description: The canonical clio MCP routing map: a two-level, names-only table that maps a task (pages, entities, data, applications) to the get-guidance article(s) to read before acting. The server instructions mandate reading this first on any operation.

resources.title: Run process buttons
resources.description: Guides adding a Freedom UI button that starts a Creatio business process with the correct request, parameters, and page context.

resources.title: Server-to-server OAuth
resources.description: Guides use of Creatio server-to-server OAuth clients, token acquisition, API calls, secret handling, verification, and troubleshooting.

resources.title: Support mode
resources.description: Guides diagnostic-first execution in support mode, including severity routing, confirmation probes, fail-fast evidence, and reporting.

resources.title: System settings
resources.description: Guides package code that reads and writes Creatio system settings through focused abstractions and dependency injection.

resources.title: System setting tests
resources.description: Guides tests for package code that consumes Creatio system settings through mocked access abstractions.

resources.title: System settings MCP operations
resources.description: Guides the Creatio system-settings create, read, and update tool flow, supported value types, lookup resolution, secure values, dates, and binary uploads.

resources.title: Custom themes
resources.description: Guides creation, modification, deletion, discovery, application, reset, default selection, and deployment of custom Creatio themes.

resources.title: Freedom UI projects
resources.description: Guides scaffolding a Freedom UI Angular remote-module project inside an existing clio workspace, including arguments, names, paths, and prerequisites.

resources.title: Virtual entities
resources.description: Guides creation and verification of a virtual entity object, IEntityQueryExecutor implementation, querying, and Creatio 10.0+ EntityEventListener writes.

resources.title: When to use requests
resources.description: Canonical MCP guidance for wiring Freedom UI page actions to platform requests: when to reuse a built-in crt.*Request vs chain a handler vs author a usr.*Request, and the mandatory get-request-info catalog discipline — parameters as the only authorable keys (empty map = no params block), platform-injected baseParameters never in params, per-request documentation, and version scoping.
